examples: Conclusion: The O-tolyl isocyanide was detected from essential oil of Lonicera for the first time.
The effects of the ratio of reactants to organic solvent, reaction temperature and concentration of aqueous sodium hydroxide on the yield of trim-tolyl phosphate were investigated.
In the synthesis of N-(o-tolyl)-thiourea from o-toluidine, some effective measures were taken so that the quality of the product was improved and the reaction conditions were optimized.
